# One-Page Summary Mockup

Completed from `decision-capture.md` after the synthetic 2026-04-23 review fixture.

## Source Evidence

| Field | Evidence |
| --- | --- |
| Decision capture | `tests/fixtures/review-closeout-complete.md` |
| Reviewer decision | continue |
| Most useful summary line | Pattern line saves repeated nocturia questions. |
| Noisiest / riskiest summary line | Fluid context needs shorter wording. |
| Missing information that matters | Medication list support. |

## Boundary

- Synthetic data only.
- No diagnosis.
- No triage.
- No treatment advice.
- Clinician review remains required.

## Mockup Sections

| Section | Content |
| --- | --- |
| Chief concern | Patient-reported urinary frequency and nighttime urination context. |
| Duration / bother | Duration and bother stay as patient-reported fields. |
| Patient-reported pattern | Frequency, nighttime pattern, fluid context, and bladder diary readiness stay visible. |
| Priority review statements | Patient-reported statements remain clinician-review flags only. |
| Missing information | Medication list support remains visible. |
| Medication / context note | Medication review may need staff support. |
| Nurse cues | Nurse rooming can clarify missing fields if workflow allows. |
| Safety footer | Clinician review required. No diagnosis, triage, or treatment advice. |

## Revision Notes

| Change | Reviewer evidence |
| --- | --- |
| Elevate patient-reported pattern line. | Reviewer identified this as useful before entering the room. |
| Shorten fluid context wording. | Reviewer identified it as the noisiest line. |

## Done Condition

- The most useful line is preserved or elevated.
- The noisy/risky line is removed, rewritten, or demoted.
- Missing information remains visible.
- No line implies diagnosis, triage, or treatment.
